# SolutionChannel

> Channel connection for publishing a solution (Slack, WhatsApp, etc.)

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| solutionId | string | yes | - | Solution this channel belongs to |
| channel | slack \| whatsapp \| telegram \| discord \| api \| web | yes | - | Channel type |
| config | json | yes | - | Channel configuration (webhook URL, bot token, etc.) |
| status | active \| inactive | yes | inactive | Channel status |
| messageCount | integer | yes | 0 | Total messages sent through this channel |
| lastMessageAt | date | yes | - | Last message timestamp |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Solution** (via `solutionId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/solution-channel` — List all
- `POST /api/solution-channel` — Create
- `GET /api/solution-channel/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/solution-channel/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/solution-channel/:id` — Delete
